project.description: Claude Code marketplace providing development standards, automation tools, and AI-assisted workflows for CUI Open Source projects. Contains 7 production bundles with skills, agents, and commands that integrate with Claude Code's plugin system.
project.description_reasoning: source: README.adoc and CLAUDE.md project overview

default.responsibility: Root project module providing Python build infrastructure via pyprojectx. Manages test execution, linting (ruff), type checking (mypy), and coverage for all marketplace bundles.
default.responsibility_reasoning: source: pyproject.toml build config, CLAUDE.md testing section
default.purpose_reasoning: Root-level pyproject.toml orchestrating builds for all bundles

marketplace/bundles.description: Root source directory containing all 7 production bundles with skills, agents, and commands

test.description: Pytest test suites organized by bundle, testing all scripts and extensions

documentation.responsibility: Project-level documentation including architecture diagrams, build structure, and design documents.

plan-marshall.responsibility: Core orchestration bundle providing the complete development workflow — from plan initialization through task execution to PR finalization. Includes build system abstractions, extension API, architecture management, permission tooling, and CI/git integration.
plan-marshall.responsibility_reasoning: source: README.md and 52 packages spanning workflow phases, build ops, and tooling
plan-marshall.purpose_reasoning: Primary runtime bundle with 42 skills, 8 agents, 2 commands

skill:manage-architecture.description: LLM-based architectural analysis transforming raw project data into semantic module descriptions
